subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of 'Akká: "Verily, there is none other God but Me, the All-Hearing, the All-Responding." We have willed to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد اسمع الندآء من شطر عکاء انه لا اله الا انا السامع المجیب انا اردنا ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @consolation and comfort
